title: Fix virtual methods
body: Currently on master, virtual methods don't work properly if they are called from a method of a class that don't override them. The wrong behavior is caused by emitting calls of methods defined in a base class with `<base class name>::` prefix. This prefix is needed to handle function calls with `super` references. In this PR, I mark such calls and use this prefix only in their case. Virtual methods work properly with this fix.
